parameters.query: UPDATE outreach_leads SET status = 'Replied', reply_category = 'INTERESTED', notes = '{{ ($json.replyPreview200 || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', updated_at = NOW() WHERE email = '{{ ($json.email || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}' RETURNING id

UPDATE outreach_leads SET status = 'Replied', reply_category = 'NOT_NOW', notes = 'Re-engage after 90 days ({{ $json.reengageDateStr }}). {{ ($json.replyPreview200 || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', updated_at = NOW() WHERE email = '{{ ($json.email || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}' RETURNING id
